title: Belgium issues visas to Taliban delegation for EU migration talks

title: Qatargate: Belgian judiciary issues arrest warrant for former EU Commissioner Dimitris Avramopoulos
content: The Qatargate investigation centres on allegations that foreign governments sought to influence decision-making in the European Parliament through payments and gifts to current and former lawmakers.

title: EU sets stage for decoupling Moldova's accession bid from Ukraine's
content: From the start, the accession bids of Moldova and Ukraine have been informally coupled. But now, after the opening of the first cluster of negotiations, the two candidates might go on separate ways.
snippet: From the start, the accession bids of Moldova and Ukraine have been informally coupled. But now, after the opening of the first cluster of negotiations, the two candidates might go on separate ways.

title: EU 're-assessing' summit with UK after Keir Starmer lays out exit plan
content: A European Commission spokesperson said on Monday that the EU is "reassessing" plans to hold a summit with the UK in late July, as it becomes increasingly likely that Prime Minister Keir Starmer's successor will be in post in just three and a half weeks.

title: Row between Poland and Ukraine over medals intensifies

title: Farms, schools, rail and health services under strain as heatwave grips France
